logging-spring-tests/src/main/java/com/g.general_idea: Explicitly specify the parameter name in @RequestParam to ensure correct binding.
Explicitly declare the consumed media type for the POST endpoint to handle form data.
Add a new endpoint to handle multipart file uploads.

logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.general_idea: Introduce a BeforeEach setup method to configure a MemoryAppender for capturing log output from the SpringLoggingFilter.
logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.human_impl: @BeforeEach void setup() { Logger logger = (Logger) LoggerFactory.getLogger(SpringLoggingFilter.class); memoryAppender = new MemoryAppender(); ... }

logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.general_idea: Add assertions to existing tests to verify that the logging filter correctly captures request/response data.
Refactor the postByIdReqParam test to use HttpEntity with form-urlencoded content instead of passing null body.
Add a new test case to verify multipart file upload handling and logging.
logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.human_impl: @Test public void postMultipart() throws IOException { ... body.add("file", getTestFile()); ... }

logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.general_idea: Add a helper method to create a temporary file resource for testing multipart uploads.
logging-spring-tests/src/test/java/com/g.human_impl: public Resource getTestFile() throws IOException { Path testFile = Files.createTempFile(...); return new FileSystemResource(testFile.toFile()); }

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Introduce a new configuration property to allow ignoring request/response payloads in the logging filter.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.human_impl: Added 'private boolean ignorePayload = false;' field and corresponding getter/setter methods.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Wire the new ignorePayload configuration into the SpringLoggingFilter bean instantiation.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.human_impl: Updated loggingFilter() bean method to pass 'ignorePayload' as the fourth argument to the SpringLoggingFilter constructor.

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Extract request and response logging logic into a dedicated LoggingPrinter class to reduce boilerplate and improve maintainability.
Remove the import for org.apache.commons.io.IOUtils as it is no longer used directly in this class after refactoring.
Remove the unused import for java.util.Map.
Remove the unused static import for net.logstash.logback.argument.StructuredArguments.value.
Add a new boolean parameter 'ignorePayload' to the constructor to allow controlling payload logging behavior.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.human_impl: public SpringLoggingFilter(..., boolean logHeaders, boolean ignorePayload)

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Remove the unused variable assignment retrieving handler methods map, which was likely leftover debugging or unused code.
Cache the request parameter map in the constructor to ensure it remains accessible after the input stream is consumed.
Override getParameterMap to return the cached map, preventing errors when parameters are accessed after the body has been read.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.human_impl: @Override public Map<String, String[]> getParameterMap() { return parameterMap; }

logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.general_idea: Use the query string as the body content if present, otherwise fall back to reading the input stream.
logstash-logging-spring-boot-starter/src.human_impl: String query = request.getQueryString(); if (query != null) { body = query.getBytes(); } else { ... }

reactive-logging-spring-tests/src/main/j.general_idea: Add a new GET endpoint to handle request parameters for testing purposes.
Add a new POST endpoint consuming form-urlencoded data to handle request parameters for testing purposes.
reactive-logging-spring-tests/src/main/j.human_impl: @PostMapping(value = "/req-param", consumes = MediaType.APPLICATION_FORM_URLENCODED_VALUE) public Mono<String> postWithIdRequest(@RequestParam("id") Integer id)

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Enhance request logging to include query parameters for better auditability.
Fix missing spaces around operators in conditional statement for readability.
Fix missing space after comma in method argument list for readability.
Standardize code indentation from mixed/tabs to 4-space indentation.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.human_impl: Re-indented class body and nested blocks to use 4 spaces.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Remove explicit MDC clearing to prevent side effects on concurrent requests or parent context.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.human_impl: Removed MDC.clear(); call at the start of generateAndSetMDC.

reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.general_idea: Fix logic error where correlation ID was incorrectly read from and written to the request ID header name.
reactive-logstash-logging-spring-boot-st.human_impl: Changed request.getHeaders().get(requestIdHeaderName) to get(correlationIdHeaderName) and MDC.put keys to correlationIdHeaderName.
